expectations.text: Creates a GitHub issue capturing the task
expectations.evidence: 1 issues; titles=['Add a dark-mode toggle to the settings page']

expectations.text: Issue carries a planning-agent plan comment
Issue carries a review comment with an explicit 'Verdict: APPROVED'
At least one commit uses Conventional Commit format
A commit includes the Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer
No GitHub Project was created (only 1 issue, below the >3 threshold)
